  • weekly picks (Jun 2 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 June 2nd week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    06/08

    1. s41467-026-74051-7 Intermolecular interactions optimization in weakly solvating ether solvents for wide-temperature Na metal batteries (Nature Communications)

    2. s41598-026-55166-9 A single reinforcement learning model to unify habit formation and Pavlovian-instrumental interaction (Scientific Reports)

    3. s41598-026-56780-3 Constructing a prognostic survival model for patients with stage II-IV epithelial ovarian cancer: a study based on the SEER database and external validation in China (Scientific Reports)

    4. 2606.06579v1 Self-organized Floquet band geometry in cavity-driven quantum materials (arXiv)

    5. 2606.06584v1 Bootstrap bounds for Quantum Spin Systems using String Operators (arXiv)

    6. 2606.06605v1 Tensor network study of deconfined quantum criticality in a one-dimensional spin-phonon model (arXiv)

    7. 2606.06616v1 Temperature-Induced Crossover of Coherent Phonon Mechanisms in Chiral 2D Perovskites (arXiv)

    8. 2606.06623v1 Matching Terahertz and Hall Mobilities as a Hallmark of Intrinsic Charge Transport in Metal-Halide Perovskites (arXiv)

    9. 2606.06626v1 Non-Hermitian Crystalline Braid Topology from Hermitian Projection: A Zero-Mode Resonance Mechanism (arXiv)

    10. 2606.06649v1 Charge density waves and enhanced superconductivity in the electron-hole gas: a plausible, simple, physically intuitive model (arXiv)

    11. 2606.06659v1 Riemann Rarefaction Waves in a Strongly Interacting Fermi Gas (arXiv)

    12. 2606.06678v1 Field-rigid Ising antiferromagnetism with giant spin-flip fields in Van der Waals UOTe (arXiv)

    13. 2606.06680v1 Symmetry-Protected Phonon Topology and Low Lattice Thermal Conductivity in Square-Octagonal Chalcogenides (arXiv)

    14. 2606.06734v1 Engineering magnetic anisotropy and ferromagnetism in topological Kagome metal GdV6Sn6 via Nd substitution (arXiv)

    15. 2606.06771v1 Atomic-scale phase-field modeling for 2D ferroelectrics including non-Gaussian fluctuations (arXiv)

    16. 2606.06791v1 Magnetic Field Walls in Flat-band Superconductors (arXiv)

    17. 2606.06858v1 Complex Temperature-dependent Thermal Conductivity in a Sawtooth Chain Magnet Fe$\mathrm{2}$SiSe$\mathrm{4}$ (arXiv)

    18. 2606.06925v1 A Machine-Learning Based Approach to the Evaluation of the Critical Scaling Behavior of Anisotropic Spin Systems (arXiv)

    19. 2606.06939v1 Layer-Polarization-Driven Metal-Insulator Transition in multi-band Graphene Moire’ Superlattices (arXiv)

    20. 2606.06948v1 Spin SWAP operation in double quantum dots at the LaAlO3/SrTiO3 interface (arXiv)

    21. 2606.06952v1 Characterization of Nonlinear Dynamics in Semiconductors in Frequency Domain using Modulated Photoexcitation (arXiv)

    22. 2606.06980v1 Electric-field induced trends of exchange interactions in transition-metal trilayers (arXiv)

    23. 2606.06981v1 Fate of the Ising universality class under nonreciprocal interactions (arXiv)

    24. 2606.06999v1 Light-tunable quantum metric non-linear Hall response in Berry dipole semimetals (arXiv)

    25. 2606.07002v1 Phase lag enhances synchronization in coupled oscillators with inertia (arXiv)

    26. 2606.07041v1 Nonlinear sigma models, antiperiodic boundary conditions, spin chains, and ‘t Hooft anomalies (arXiv)

    27. 2606.07042v1 Unravelling the Role of Stacking Disorder on the Optoelectronic Properties of Zn3P2 (arXiv)

    28. 2606.07095v1 Cocktail effect and robust Berry curvature driven anomalous Hall conductivity in the entropy-stabilized Heusler alloy Co$2$(Ti${0.25}$V${0.25}$Cr${0.25}$Fe$_{0.25}$)Al (arXiv)

    29. 2606.07111v1 Failure of the Quench Action Formalism for Mott Insulator Initial States (arXiv)

    30. 2606.07133v1 Enhanced viscous adhesion using deformable structure (arXiv)

    31. 2606.07137v1 Inverse Melting of 3D Antiferromagnetic Order in Multi-sublattice Magnetic Perovskites (arXiv)

    32. 2606.07138v1 Chromium chalcohalide Janus monolayer ferromagnets with perpendicular magnetic anisotropy and high Curie temperature (arXiv)

    33. 2606.07178v1 Phase diagram of the extended chequerboard $J-Q$ model (arXiv)

    34. 2606.07184v1 Multiband superconductivity in the kagome-lattice superconductor Re2Zr (arXiv)

    35. 2606.07188v1 Asymmetry dynamics and nonequilibrium symmetry-breaking phase transitions (arXiv)

    36. 2606.07197v1 On the true low-energy excitations of the three-dimensional spin glass (arXiv)

    37. 2606.07199v1 Squeezing dynamical singlets in bilayer nickelates (arXiv)

    38. 2606.07204v1 Ptychographic Algorithms for Phase Recovery in 4D Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy (arXiv)

    39. 2606.07247v1 Theory of learning of high-dimensional controlled non-linear dynamical systems (I): models and methods (arXiv)

    40. 2606.07266v1 Vortex dynamics in rotating dipolar supersolids across Josephson and self-trapping regimes (arXiv)

    41. 2606.07267v1 Peculiarities Of Phase States In N2O-CO2 Cryoalloys According To Electron Diffraction Data (arXiv)

    42. 2606.07274v1 Topological Anderson insulators and reentrant topological transitions in a quasiperiodic long-range Su-Schrieffer-Heeger model (arXiv)

    43. 2606.07305v1 Flexible PDMS/La${0.7}$Sr${0.3}$MnO$_3$/MWCNT Composite Thin Films for Multifunctional Temperature and Magnetic Sensing Electronic Skin (arXiv)

    44. 2606.07323v1 How Similar Can Fractional Chern Insulators Be to Fractional Quantum Hall States? Moir'e-Enhanced Gaps and Excitation-Spectrum Correspondence (arXiv)

    45. 2606.07349v1 Direct High-Magnetic-Field Coupling to Stripe Order in a Cuprate Superconductor (arXiv)

    46. 2606.07371v1 Resolving Light-Induced Structural Rearrangements in Responsive Microgels (arXiv)

    47. 2606.07395v1 Polar and quadratic magneto-optical Kerr effects in nonmagnetic/ferromagnet bilayers for spin-orbit torque measurements (arXiv)

    48. 2606.07396v1 Scalable Prediction of Complex Surface Reconstructions under Operating Conditions via Harmony-Search-Based Global Optimization (arXiv)

    49. 2606.07405v1 Near-room-temperature magnetoelectric coupling engineered through inversion-breaking tilts in a bulk perovskite polytype (arXiv)

    50. 2606.07415v1 Fermion sign problem and the structure of Lee-Yang zeros. II. Finite temperature results for a model system without interactions (arXiv)

    51. 2606.07509v1 Bulk Superconductivity driven by Disorder-Induced Delocalization in 4Hb-Ta(S$_{1-x}$Se$_x$)$_2$ (arXiv)

    52. 2606.07517v1 Non-Abelian braiding in Abelian Fractional Quantum Hall Phases from realistic interactions (arXiv)

    53. 2606.06450v1 1/3 Fractional and Gapless Integer Quantum Anomalous Hall States in Rhombohedral Graphene (arXiv)

    54. 2606.06504v1 Structural gradients and strain partitioning across the mouse Achilles tendon enthesis revealed by in situ X-ray scattering (arXiv)

    55. 2606.06561v1 Amplitude-dependent quantum hydrodynamics from a (\coth)-Madelung ansatz (arXiv)

    56. 2606.06597v1 Quantum-stabilized patterns in a vector Hopfield network (arXiv)

    57. 2606.06611v1 Sensing ac fields with quantum many-body scars (arXiv)

    58. 2606.06653v1 Higher-order Symmetric Quantum Mpemba Effect in Fragmented Systems (arXiv)

    59. 2606.06658v1 Capturing non-Markovian dynamics in non-equilibrium stochastic systems using flow matching (arXiv)

    60. 2606.06693v1 Fluctuation-induced and quantum effects in nanofluidic transport (arXiv)

    61. 2606.06848v1 Distilling first-principles accuracy into compact machine learning potentials for condensed-phase chemistry (arXiv)

    62. 2606.06919v1 Scalable Quantum Algorithms for Gutzwiller Projection (arXiv)

    63. 2606.07018v1 A survey on rigorous results for the dynamics of periodic FPU chains (arXiv)

    64. 2606.07051v1 Quantum correlations and coherence in a two-qubit anisotropic $XY$ under magnetic field (arXiv)

    65. 2606.07168v1 Continuous-time quantum control across an exponentially small bottleneck in a frustrated Ising ring model (arXiv)

    66. 2606.07221v1 Long-range interactions assisted shortcuts to adiabaticity and battery charging in open quantum critical systems (arXiv)
